description: البحث عن خطوط عربية محددة (Cairo, Tajawal, Amiri) في مجلد canvas-fonts
command_preview: Get-ChildItem -Path "$env:USERPROFILE\Desktop\projects\final agent\agent\skills\canvas-design\canvas-fonts" -Include *cairo*,*tajawal*,*amiri*,*noto*arab*,*arabic* -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, FullName, Length | Format-List
